tools.name: bills.billDetailBillsJurisdictionSessionBillIdGet
tools.description: Obtain bill information based on (state, session, bill_id).

tools.name: bills.billDetailByIdBillsOcdBillOpenstatesBillIdGet
tools.description: Obtain bill information by internal ID in the format ocd-bill/*uuid*.

tools.name: bills.billsSearchBillsGet
tools.description:
Search for bills matching given criteria.

Must either specify a jurisdiction or a full text query (q).  Additional parameters will
futher restrict bills returned.

tools.name: committees.committeeDetailCommitteesCommitteeIdGet
tools.description: Get details on a single committee by ID.

tools.name: events.eventDetailEventsEventIdGet
tools.description: Get details on a single event by ID.

tools.name: jurisdictions.jurisdictionDetailJurisdictionsJurisdictionIdGet
tools.description: Get details on a single Jurisdiction (e.g. state or municipality).

tools.name: jurisdictions.jurisdictionListJurisdictionsGet
tools.description: Get list of supported Jurisdictions, a Jurisdiction is a state or municipality.

tools.name: people.peopleGeoPeopleGeoGet
tools.description:
Get list of people currently representing a given location.

**Note:** Currently limited to state legislators and US Congress.  Governors & mayors are not included.

tools.name: people.peopleSearchPeopleGet
tools.description:
Get list of people matching selected criteria.

Must provide either **jurisdiction**, **name**, or one or more **id** parameters.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
